The Residence

A private mansion of more than six hundred square metres over four levels at Manastiri Bay, with its own pool and expansive terraces. An exceptional residence at the head of the bay — space, privacy and light on a scale rare to the coast.

FROM THE GROUND UP

Watch Manastiri take shape

Filmed on site over the course of construction — the frame rising, the terraces forming, the façade closing in. A rare look at how a residence of this quality is actually built.
